name: Pac-Man
description: The 1980 arcade classic in its original style: a blue double-line maze on black, peach pellets and four energizers, the chomping hero and the four ghosts (Blinky, Pinky, Inky, Clyde) with distinct chase/scatter personalities, a frightened blue mode, eyes returning home when eaten, the warp tunnel, lives and score. Swipe the maze or use the D-pad to steer.
